title: adenostemma rufescens
intro: Adenostemma rufescens, also known as the red lip plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Adenostemma rufescens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
